name: deutschebahn.com:betriebsstellen
prose:
# Betriebsstellen API

This REST-API enables you to query station and stop infos

## Getting started

The Betriebsstellen API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://api.deutschebahn.com/betriebsstellen/v1`.

## Authentication

No authentication is required to call this API.

## API reference

### GET /betriebsstellen
Get information of stations matching a given text
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `name`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /betriebsstellen/{abbrev}
Get information about a specific station or stop by abbrevation
Returns a single record.
